productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Minstrel Shoulder Loop Blue T-shirt

Designed with a neat print, the soft grey? with thin white stripes adds to this tee a regal touch. The soft cotton fabric keeps you dry and fresh all day, while the  ribbed sleeve hems Fit around you well toned arms perfectly. The longer front with split sides offers an absolutely cofmortable fit.
